name: wtf_meiotic_driver_family
description: wtf meiotic driver gene family in S. pombe. ~25 wtf paralogs scattered across all three chromosomes encoding poison/antidote selfish elements that distort meiotic segregation in heterozygous diploids. Paralog identity 60-99%; recent wtf duplications are mapping-difficult on short reads. Not strictly LTR-class but a tandem-paralog family with similar mapping characteristics, included here as the second large dispersed paralog family in S. pombe.

architecture.internal_structure: 2000 bp dispersed unit; LTR 0 bp where applicable
